headline: Europe’s Stocks Are Back in the Lead as Stagflation Risks Ease

headline: Elior Group (ENXTPA:ELIOR) Stock Draws Fresh Price Target Split After Profit Warning
summary: Elior Group is back in focus after analysts reduced their average price target to a range of about €2.40 to €2.90 per share, while the central fair value estimate remains unchanged at €2.46. This adjustment aligns with a more cautious stance following the profit warning, as several banks shifted ratings to Neutral or Hold and reworked their assumptions around recovery timing and execution risks. Read on to see how these updated targets fit into the broader analyst narrative and what to watch...
